title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcanens
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcanens is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcanens include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making infusions or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
